title: Interactive Analytics Dashboard (100% Local Demo)
summary: This is a fully-populated local demo project. Open the modal to see the gallery and embed video!
longDescription:
Welcome to the fully-populated demo case study!

This project demonstrates how a completed setup appears on your local server. It uses 100% local images downloaded natively into the `/portfolio/projects/0-demo-case-study/` folder, proving that no external hosting is required for images to work perfectly.

Notice that the gallery images in this modal loaded in their exact alphabetical order, exactly as intended.
impact: Loaded local photos natively using the updated generator logic.
Proved that images are automatically sorted alphabetically (1_dashboard, 2_reports, 3_mobile).
